summary: Iteration 111 - Guardian To-Do and IAC Split Feature Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed FPDF PDF generation bug in export-todo endpoint. Frontend UI verified showing 5 action buttons: Analyze Vault, Generate To-Do List, Generate IAC, Readiness Score, Beneficiary Review.

bugs_fixed_by_tester.root_cause: After pdf.cell() call for bullet/checklist items, the x position was not being reset, causing 'Not enough horizontal space to render a single character' error in subsequent multi_cell calls
bugs_fixed_by_tester.fix: Added pdf.set_x(left_margin) at start of each line iteration loop to reset x position, and used multi_cell(0, 5, ...) instead of fixed width for bullet text

passed_tests: generate_todo response does NOT contain checklist_json block
generate_todo does NOT populate IAC database (no items_added field)
POST /api/chat/guardian with action='generate_iac' returns action_result.action='iac_generated' with items_added
POST /api/guardian/export-todo returns valid PDF (200, application/pdf, %PDF header)
POST /api/guardian/export-checklist still works for existing IAC items
Frontend displays 5 action buttons: Analyze Vault, Generate To-Do List, Generate IAC, Readiness Score, Beneficiary Review
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 111 verified the Guardian To-Do and IAC split feature. The generate_todo action now returns action_result.action='todo_generated' and frontend shows 'Download To-Do List PDF' button. The generate_iac action populates the IAC database and shows '{N} IAC items added' badge. Fixed FPDF x-position bug in export-todo endpoint. The xAI API sometimes returns 502 errors under load - this is transient and not a code issue.
